en_title: Nintendo President Says The Pokémon Company Will 'Take Measures' to Respond to Widespread Card Scalping Issues
cn_title: 任天堂社长称宝可梦公司将应对卡牌倒卖问题
subtitle: 卡牌抢不到
opus_summary: 任天堂社长古川俊太郎回应宝可梦卡牌短缺和倒卖问题，称宝可梦公司正采取按单生产、与平台合作、抽选验证等措施。该系列仅2025年就生产了100亿张卡。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo's president has been asked to address the current state of Pokémon trading card shortages and scalping — a situation that many fans feel is now worse than ever, despite an astonishing 10 billion cards being printed last year alone.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂社长被要求回应宝可梦集换式卡牌短缺和倒卖的现状。尽管仅去年就印刷了惊人的100亿张卡，许多粉丝仍认为情况比以往任何时候都糟。

paragraphs.en: New card launches are continually left sold out due to scalpers looking to make a profit on eBay, while boxes of cards are now commonly the subject of store thefts — including dozens of instances where trading card stores have been broken into overnight. One card shop in New York was recently targeted by armed thieves in broad daylight, leaving terrified staff and shoppers held at gunpoint . In May, reports emerged of a Florida man who was arrested on suspicion of stealing $12,000 of Pokémon cards while wielding a battery-powered chainsaw . And in April, another desperate Pokémon fan was arrested in Pasadena, California, after .
paragraphs.cn: 由于倒卖者试图在eBay获利，新卡发售持续迅速售罄，而整盒卡牌如今也经常成为商店盗窃目标，包括数十起集换式卡牌店夜间被破门而入的事件。纽约一家卡牌店最近在光天化日之下遭武装盗贼袭击，员工和顾客被枪口威胁，惊恐不已。5月，有报道称佛罗里达一名男子因涉嫌挥舞电动链锯盗窃价值12000美元(约合人民币8万元)的宝可梦卡牌而被捕。4月，加州帕萨迪纳另一名绝望的宝可梦粉丝也被逮捕。

paragraphs.en: But with demand sky high, what can Nintendo and The Pokémon Company do solve the issue for fans left unable to buy cards without having to fork out more money themselves (or turn to a life of crime)?
paragraphs.cn: 但在需求高到离谱的情况下，任天堂和宝可梦公司能为那些不想花更多钱、也不想走上犯罪道路却买不到卡牌的粉丝做些什么？

paragraphs.en: The issue has become so high-profile that Nintendo president Shuntaro Furukawa was asked for his opinion at a recent shareholder AGM — during which he revealed that Nintendo was aware of the "issue," and discussed "appropriate ways to deliver products to consumers."
paragraphs.cn: 这个问题已经变得非常受关注，以至于任天堂社长古川俊太郎在最近一次股东大会上被问到看法。他透露，任天堂知道这个「问题」，并讨论了「向消费者交付产品的适当方式」。

paragraphs.en: "With respect to the Pokémon Trading Card Game offered by The Pokémon Company, which is an equity-method subsidiary of Nintendo, we are aware of instances where limited-quantity cards are purchased in large volume, leading to high-priced reselling in the market," Furukawa said, in remarks now officially made public by Nintendo.
paragraphs.cn: 古川在任天堂现已正式公开的发言中说：「关于由任天堂权益法适用关联公司宝可梦公司提供的宝可梦集换式卡牌游戏，我们知道存在限量卡牌被大量购买、并在市场上高价转售的情况。」

paragraphs.en: "In response, The Pokémon Company is taking various measures, including made-to-order sales and agreements with marketplace operators. For online priority drawings for certain products, I understand that The Pokémon Company also plans to use an account verification method that utilizes My Number Cards [Japan’s official government-issued ID cards].
paragraphs.cn: 「作为回应，宝可梦公司正在采取各种措施，包括按单生产销售，以及与交易平台运营方达成协议。对于某些产品的线上优先抽选，我了解到宝可梦公司还计划使用一种利用My Number Card（日本官方政府发行的身份证件）的账号验证方式。」

paragraphs.en: "Nintendo also communicates with The Pokémon Company as needed to discuss appropriate ways to deliver products to consumers," Furukawa concluded. "We believe that The Pokémon Company will continue to take measures to respond to this issue."
paragraphs.cn: 古川总结说：「任天堂也会根据需要与宝可梦公司沟通，讨论向消费者交付产品的适当方式。我们相信宝可梦公司将继续采取措施应对这一问题。」

paragraphs.en: The Pokémon Company recently released a set of astonishing sales figures which showed the enormous popularity of Pokémon cards, of which 85 billion have been produced to date. 10 billion cards were manufactured in 2025 alone — more cards than the number of people on the planet, and still nowhere near enough.
paragraphs.cn: 宝可梦公司最近公布了一组惊人的销售数字，显示宝可梦卡牌拥有巨大人气。迄今为止，该系列已生产850亿张卡。仅2025年一年就制造了100亿张，比地球人口还多，却仍远远不够。

paragraphs.en: Card manufacturing has been boosted significantly in recent years to try and keep up with demand. 43 billion cards were printed in the 25 years between October 1996 and March 2022, but essentially the same amount again has now been released in just the past four years. And with the brand's eye-catching 30th anniversary set due in September , the situation is unlikely to calm down anytime soon.
paragraphs.cn: 近年来，卡牌制造已经大幅提升，以试图跟上需求。从1996年10月到2022年3月的25年间，该系列共印刷430亿张卡；但本质上同样数量的卡，如今只用了过去四年就再次发行。随着这个品牌醒目的30周年纪念套装定于9月推出，情况不太可能很快平静下来。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
